questions.question: Why do GitHub-hosted Actions jobs fail before the first step and produce no downloadable job log?
questions.rationale: Remote CI must initialize and validate a clean database before scientific ingestion can begin.

questions.question: Can the legacy bootstrap-only release database be recovered and its raw database SHA-256 recorded?
questions.rationale: The visible default branch identifies a Git bundle but does not directly expose the parent database hash. The repair run therefore records the parent Git commit and a migrated empty pre-run database instead of claiming a byte-identical legacy snapshot.

questions.question: Will the repaired infrastructure pull request pass remote CI and be merged into main?
questions.rationale: Module 1 must not begin while the canonical default branch remains on the defective bootstrap architecture.

questions.question: What authoritative identifier and nomenclature source set should seed MOR, DOR, KOR, and NOP entity versions?
questions.rationale: This is the exact first scientific task after the infrastructure gate passes.
